name: Biarkan Ia Pergi
overview: Biarkan Ia Pergi is a 2022 Malaysian television drama series directed by Fairuz Loy, starring Isyariana Che Azmi, Amar Baharin, and Mior Darwish. This series starts its premiere on Samarinda Slot, TV3 starting 11 August 2022 replacing Tarik Aku Ke Syurga. This is the second drama project together with Amar and Isyariana after Hati Yang Dikhainati.
